title: Center of Mass of a Rectangle with Nonuniform Density
body: A rectangular material of length a and width $$b$$ is made up of a material of nonuniform density. When the rectangle is placed in the xy-plane with one corner at the origin and its two edges along the positive $$x-$$ and $$y-axes$$, the density is given by $$rho(x,y)=\rho_0 x y$$, where $$\rho_0$$ is a constant.
